nasb.text: When he came to the hill, he took them from their hand and deposited them in the house, and he sent the men away, and they departed.

esv.text: And when he came to the hill, he took them from their hand and put them in the house, and he sent the men away, and they departed.

cnv.text: 到達山岡後，他就從他們手中接過東西，存放在屋子裡，然後打發他們離去，他們就走了。

ccb.text: 到了山冈，基哈西接过银子和衣服，放进屋里，便让他们回去了。
